revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 三島神社 |画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=賀茂郡}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=11|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|frame-height=|coord={{coord|34|37|48.6|N|138|48|33|E}}}} |所在地 = [[静岡県]][[賀茂郡]][[南伊豆町]]入間713 |位置 = {{coord|34|37|48.6|N|138|48|33|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = [[事代主命]] |社格 = [[式内社]]論社 |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 11月2日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=三島神社|coordinates= {{coord2|34|37|48.6|N|138|48|33|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} '''三島神社'''（みしまじんじゃ）は、[[静岡県]][[賀茂郡]][[南伊豆町]]入間（いるま）にある[[神社]]<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401116 三島神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>。
== 概要 == 南伊豆町の南西、入間(いるま)地区の北方山麓に鎮座している。
創建は不詳だが、[[式内社]]である'''穂都佐(和)気命神社'''（ほつさ(わ)けのみことじんじゃ）の論社であり、『[[伊豆国神階帳]]』にも「従四位上 をつさわけの明神」と記されている古社である<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima2_title.htm 三島神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140137-02.html 三島神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>。
== 祭神 == * [[事代主命]]
== 脚注 == {{Reflist}}
== 外部リンク == * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401116 三島神社] - 静岡県神社庁
{{DEFAULTSORT:みしましんしや みなみいすちよういるま}} [[Category:静岡県の神社]] [[Category:南伊豆町の歴史]] [[Category:南伊豆町の建築物]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]] [[Category:三島・大山祇信仰]]

{{nihongo|'''Mishima Shrine (Minamiizu )'''|三島神社 (南伊豆町入間)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Mishima Shrine (Minamiizu )'''|三島神社 (南伊豆町入間)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

revision.comment: 1 revision imported
revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 三島神社 |画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=賀茂郡}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=11|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|frame-height=|coord={{coord|34|37|48.6|N|138|48|33|E}}}} |所在地 = [[静岡県]][[賀茂郡]][[南伊豆町]]入間713 |位置 = {{coord|34|37|48.6|N|138|48|33|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = [[事代主命]] |社格 = [[式内社]]論社 |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 11月2日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=三島神社|coordinates= {{coord2|34|37|48.6|N|138|48|33|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} '''三島神社'''（みしまじんじゃ）は、[[静岡県]][[賀茂郡]][[南伊豆町]]入間（いるま）にある[[神社]]<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401116 三島神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>。
== 概要 == 南伊豆町の南西、入間(いるま)地区の北方山麓に鎮座している。
創建は不詳だが、[[式内社]]である'''穂都佐(和)気命神社'''（ほつさ(わ)けのみことじんじゃ）の論社であり、『[[伊豆国神階帳]]』にも「従四位上 をつさわけの明神」と記されている古社である<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima2_title.htm 三島神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140137-02.html 三島神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>。
== 祭神 == * [[事代主命]]
== 脚注 == {{Reflist}}
== 外部リンク == * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401116 三島神社] - 静岡県神社庁
{{DEFAULTSORT:みしましんしや みなみいすちよういるま}} [[Category:静岡県の神社]] [[Category:南伊豆町の歴史]] [[Category:南伊豆町の建築物]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]] [[Category:三島・大山祇信仰]]

== Japanese Wikipedia content == {{神社 |名称 = 三島神社 |画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=賀茂郡}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=11|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|frame-height=|coord={{coord|34|37|48.6|N|138|48|33|E}}}} |所在地 = [[静岡県]][[賀茂郡]][[南伊豆町]]入間713 |位置 = {{coord|34|37|48.6|N|138|48|33|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = [[事代主命]] |社格 = [[式内社]]論社 |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 11月2日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=三島神社|coordinates= {{coord2|34|37|48.6|N|138|48|33|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} '''三島神社'''（みしまじんじゃ）は、[[静岡県]][[賀茂郡]][[南伊豆町]]入間（いるま）にある[[神社]]<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401116 三島神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>。
== 概要 == 南伊豆町の南西、入間(いるま)地区の北方山麓に鎮座している。
創建は不詳だが、[[式内社]]である'''穂都佐(和)気命神社'''（ほつさ(わ)けのみことじんじゃ）の論社であり、『[[伊豆国神階帳]]』にも「従四位上 をつさわけの明神」と記されている古社である<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima2_title.htm 三島神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140137-02.html 三島神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>。
== 祭神 == * [[事代主命]]
== 脚注 == {{Reflist}}
== 外部リンク == * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401116 三島神社] - 静岡県神社庁
{{DEFAULTSORT:みしましんしや みなみいすちよういるま}} [[Category:静岡県の神社]] [[Category:南伊豆町の歴史]] [[Category:南伊豆町の建築物]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]] [[Category:三島・大山祇信仰]]
==End Japanese==

'''三島神社'''（みしまじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|静岡県|Q131320}}{{jalink|賀茂郡|Q961511}}{{jalink|南伊豆町|Q1203741}}入間（いるま）にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401116 三島神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>。

=== 概要 ===
南伊豆町の南西、入間(いるま)地区の北方山麓に鎮座している。

創建は不詳だが、{{jalink|式内社}}である'''穂都佐(和)気命神社'''（ほつさ(わ)けのみことじんじゃ）の論社であり、『{{jalink|伊豆国神階帳|Q17193087}}』にも「従四位上 をつさわけの明神」と記されている古社である<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima2_title.htm 三島神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140137-02.html 三島神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>。

=== 祭神 ===
* {{jalink|事代主命}}

=== 脚注 ===

=== 外部リンク ===
* [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401116 三島神社] - 静岡県神社庁

'''三島神社'''（みしまじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|静岡県|Q131320}}{{jalink|賀茂郡|Q961511}}{{jalink|南伊豆町|Q1203741}}入間（いるま）にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401116 三島神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>。

=== 概要 ===
南伊豆町の南西、入間(いるま)地区の北方山麓に鎮座している。

創建は不詳だが、{{jalink|式内社}}である'''穂都佐(和)気命神社'''（ほつさ(わ)けのみことじんじゃ）の論社であり、『{{jalink|伊豆国神階帳|Q17193087}}』にも「従四位上 をつさわけの明神」と記されている古社である<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima2_title.htm 三島神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140137-02.html 三島神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>。

=== 祭神 ===
* {{jalink|事代主命}}

=== 脚注 ===
{{Reflist}}

=== 外部リンク ===
* [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401116 三島神社] - 静岡県神社庁

{{coord2|34|37|48.6|N|138|48|33|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}}

'''三島神社'''（みしまじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|静岡県|Q131320}}{{jalink|賀茂郡|Q961511}}{{jalink|南伊豆町|Q1203741}}入間（いるま）にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401116 三島神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>。

=== 概要 ===
南伊豆町の南西、入間(いるま)地区の北方山麓に鎮座している。

創建は不詳だが、{{jalink|式内社}}である'''穂都佐(和)気命神社'''（ほつさ(わ)けのみことじんじゃ）の論社であり、『{{jalink|伊豆国神階帳|Q17193087}}』にも「従四位上 をつさわけの明神」と記されている古社である<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima2_title.htm 三島神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140137-02.html 三島神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>。

=== 祭神 ===
* {{jalink|事代主命}}

=== 脚注 ===
{{Reflist}}

=== 外部リンク ===
* [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401116 三島神社] - 静岡県神社庁

'''Mishima Shrine''' (???????) is a {{jalink|shrine|Q845945}} in Iruma, {{jalink|Minamiizu|Q1203741}}, {{jalink|Kamo District|Q961511}}, {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320}}<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401116 Mishima Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is located on the northern mountain foothills of the Iruma district in southwestern Minamiizu.

Its founding is unknown, but it is a candidate shrine for the {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} "Hotsusawake-no-Mikoto Shrine" (???(?)?????????), and an ancient shrine also recorded in the ''{{jalink|Izu no kuni jinjaich?|Q17193087}}'' as "J?shi-i no J? Otsusawake no My?jin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima2_title.htm Mishima Shrine] - Genmatsushi</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140137-02.html Mishima Shrine] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* {{jalink|Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto}}

=== Notes ===
{{Reflist}}

=== External links ===
* [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401116 Mishima Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Shrine Office

{{nihongo|'''Mishima Shrine (Minamiizu )'''|三島神社 (南伊豆町入間)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

'''Mishima Shrine''' (???????) is a {{jalink|shrine|Q845945}} in Iruma, {{jalink|Minamiizu|Q1203741}}, {{jalink|Kamo District|Q961511}}, {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320}}<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401116 Mishima Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is located on the northern mountain foothills of the Iruma district in southwestern Minamiizu.

Its founding is unknown, but it is a candidate shrine for the {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} "Hotsusawake-no-Mikoto Shrine" (???(?)?????????), and an ancient shrine also recorded in the ''{{jalink|Izu no kuni jinjaich?|Q17193087}}'' as "J?shi-i no J? Otsusawake no My?jin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima2_title.htm Mishima Shrine] - Genmatsushi</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140137-02.html Mishima Shrine] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* {{jalink|Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto}}

=== Notes ===
{{Reflist}}

=== External links ===
* [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401116 Mishima Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Shrine Office

{{DEFAULTSORT:??????? ???????????}}

'''Mishima Shrine''' (???????) is a {{jalink|shrine|Q845945}} in Iruma, {{jalink|Minamiizu|Q1203741}}, {{jalink|Kamo District|Q961511}}, {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320}}<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401116 Mishima Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is located on the northern mountain foothills of the Iruma district in southwestern Minamiizu.

Its founding is unknown, but it is a candidate shrine for the {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} "Hotsusawake-no-Mikoto Shrine" (???(?)?????????), and an ancient shrine also recorded in the ''{{jalink|Izu no kuni jinjaich?|Q17193087}}'' as "J?shi-i no J? Otsusawake no My?jin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima2_title.htm Mishima Shrine] - Genmatsushi</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140137-02.html Mishima Shrine] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* {{jalink|Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto}}

=== Notes ===
{{Reflist}}

=== External links ===
* [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401116 Mishima Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Shrine Office

'''Mishima Shrine''' (???????) is a {{jalink|shrine|Q845945}} in Iruma, {{jalink|Minamiizu|Q1203741}}, {{jalink|Kamo District|Q961511}}, {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320}}<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401116 Mishima Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is located on the northern mountain foothills of the Iruma district in southwestern Minamiizu.

Its founding is unknown, but it is a candidate shrine for the {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} "Hotsusawake-no-Mikoto Shrine" (???(?)?????????), and an ancient shrine also recorded in the ''{{jalink|Izu no kuni jinjaich?|Q17193087}}'' as "J?shi-i no J? It is located on the northern mountain foothills of the Iruma district in southwestern Minamiizu.

Its founding is unknown, but it is a candidate shrine for the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|UNKNOWN}} "Hotsusawake-no-Mikoto Shrine" (???(?)?????????), and an ancient shrine also recorded in the ''{{ill|lt=Izu no kuni jinjaich?|Q17193087|WD=Q17193087}}'' as "J?shi-i no J? Otsusawake no My?jin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima2_title.htm Mishima Shrine] - Genmatsushi</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140137-02.html Mishima Shrine] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is located on the northern mountain foothills of the Iruma district in southwestern Minamiizu.

Its founding is unknown, but it is a candidate shrine for the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286}} "Hotsusawake-no-Mikoto Shrine" (???(?)?????????), and an ancient shrine also recorded in the ''{{ill|lt=Izu no kuni jinjaich?|Q17193087|WD=Q17193087}}'' as "J?shi-i no J? Otsusawake no My?jin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima2_title.htm Mishima Shrine] - Genmatsushi</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140137-02.html Mishima Shrine] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

'''Mishima Shrine''' (???????) is a {{ill|lt=shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Iruma, {{ill|lt=Minamiizu|Q1203741|WD=Q1203741|1=Minamiizu}}, {{ill|lt=Kamo District|Q961511|WD=Q961511|1=Kamo District, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401116 Mishima Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is located on the northern mountain foothills of the Iruma district in southwestern Minamiizu.

Its founding is unknown, but it is a candidate shrine for the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} "Hotsusawake-no-Mikoto Shrine" (???(?)?????????), and an ancient shrine also recorded in the ''{{ill|lt=Izu no kuni jinjaich?|Q17193087|WD=Q17193087|1=Izu no kuni jinjaich?}}'' as "J?shi-i no J? Otsusawake no My?jin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima2_title.htm Mishima Shrine] - Genmatsushi</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140137-02.html Mishima Shrine] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

'''Mishima Shrine''' (???????) is a {{ill|lt=shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Iruma, {{ill|lt=Minamiizu|Q1203741|WD=Q1203741|1=Minamiizu}}, {{ill|lt=Kamo District|Q961511|WD=Q961511|1=Kamo District, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401116 Mishima Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is located on the northern mountain foothills of the Iruma district in southwestern Minamiizu.

Its founding is unknown, but it is a candidate shrine for the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} "Hotsusawake-no-Mikoto Shrine" (???(?)?????????), and an ancient shrine also recorded in the ''{{ill|lt=Izu no kuni jinjaich?|Q17193087|WD=Q17193087|1=Izu no kuni jinjaich?}}'' as "J?shi-i no J? Otsusawake no My?jin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima2_title.htm Mishima Shrine] - Genmatsushi</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140137-02.html Mishima Shrine] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

Otsusawake no My?jin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima2_title.htm Mishima Shrine] - Genmatsushi</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140137-02.html Mishima Shrine] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

'''Mishima Shrine''' (???????) is a {{ill|lt=shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Iruma, {{ill|lt=Minamiizu|Q1203741|WD=Q1203741|1=Minamiizu}}, {{ill|lt=Kamo District|Q961511|WD=Q961511|1=Kamo District, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401116 Mishima Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is located on the northern mountain foothills of the Iruma district in southwestern Minamiizu.

Its founding is unknown, but it is a candidate shrine for the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} "Hotsusawake-no-Mikoto Shrine" (???(?)?????????), and an ancient shrine also recorded in the ''{{ill|lt=Izu no kuni jinjaich?|Q17193087|WD=Q17193087|1=Izu no kuni jinjaich?}}'' as "J?shi-i no J? Otsusawake no My?jin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima2_title.htm Mishima Shrine] - Genmatsushi</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140137-02.html Mishima Shrine] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
